nodes.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate
nodes.description: name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate | short_description: Whole-wheat pancakes with egg and milk, topped with berries and maple syrup. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a small serving of Greek yogurt
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate - name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Smoky Plate | short_description: Whole-wheat pancakes with egg and milk, topped with berries and maple syrup. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a small serving of Greek yogurt or a handful of nuts to boost protein and healthy fats; use a modest amount of maple syrup to keep added sugars in check. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich from whole-wheat flour; good protein from egg and milk; berries provide vitamins and antioxidants. Maple syrup adds sugars, so portion control is helpful. Contains dairy and gluten.

nodes.name: Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo
nodes.description: name: Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo | short_description: Avocado toast on whole-grain bread topped with egg and a lemon finish. | meal_suggestion: Toast the bread, mash avocado and spread on top
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo - name: Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo | short_description: Avocado toast on whole-grain bread topped with egg and a lemon finish. | meal_suggestion: Toast the bread, mash avocado and spread on top, add a cooked egg, and finish with a squeeze of lemon and a dash of pepper. Optional flavor tweaks include adding garlic, ginger, or chili flakes if you like. | nutrition_note: Well-balanced morning option with fiber from whole-grain bread, heart-healthy fats from avocado, and protein from egg. Lemon adds vitamin C; this combo provides steady energy and satiety. Note: garlic/ginger are not included in the listed ingredients.

nodes.name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Maple-Kissed Combo
nodes.description: name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Maple-Kissed Combo | short_description: A protein-rich yogurt bowl with berries, granola, and chia seeds for a balanced mix of protein, fiber, and healthy fats. | meal_sugges
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Maple-Kissed Combo - name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Maple-Kissed Combo | short_description: A protein-rich yogurt bowl with berries, granola, and chia seeds for a balanced mix of protein, fiber, and healthy fats. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 1 cup Greek yogurt, 1/2 cup berries, 1/4 cup granola, 1 tablespoon chia seeds. For added sweetness, drizzle maple lightly; for a lower-sugar version, omit maple and use unsweetened yogurt with a low-sugar granola. | nutrition_note: Protein-forward base from Greek yogurt; fiber from berries and chia; calcium and probiotics from yogurt; granola adds crunch and additional carbs and fats. Optional maple drizzle increases sugar; to keep sugar in check, choose unsweetened yogurt and a low-sugar granola.
